steps.title: Use the find out cue
steps.content: Michel was determined to find out signals that the blank should be a question: whether blueberries could thrive beside grasses in alkaline soil.

steps.title: Compare the punctuation
steps.content: Choice A has question word order but a period; Choice B has statement order and a period; Choice C has statement order with a question mark. Choice D has question word order and a question mark. The answer is D.
